# Docs build broken after addition of hiddenType

**Describe the bug**
Because of disallowed syntax in the JSDoc comments for the new field hiddenType in `Component.Base`, the docs-build is broken

**To Reproduce**
Just try a build-all or a docs build

**Expected behavior**
Build should be successful
